title: Sword plusx
body:
# Weclome to Sword plusx

![swords](https://i.imgur.com/6cyoado.png)

## Here is all of the swords you van find in the mod



### Sword plusx adds 40 new swords

all these swords are craftable and use a new stick called aurora stick which you can craft the new swords. all the bigger swords are better than diamond this mod is mainly for mid game to add more tools for the player to make. 



You can put Sword plusx in your modpacks

link  
[discord server](https://discord.gg/MSzmYUzn8M)
